description: Business letter, fragment, from Yaʿaqov Levi to an unknown addressee. In Hebrew. Goods mentioned include: alkali (הקלי) in line 6, and coral in line 8. The writer mentions his trip to Friuli (NE Italy) in line 9. Currencies: peraḥim. Uses the title "Agha." Dating: 16th century? Information from Avraham David via FGP.
tags: coral, Friuli, alkali, perahim, Late Heb
description_he: קטע מכתב עסקי מיעקב לוי. סחורות: קלי (אלקלי), אלמוג. נסיעה לפריאול (צפון-מזרח איטליה). המאה ה-16 ?
